_comment_top: Spine v3 — Okta IdP brokering preset. The Day-0 wizard substitutes {{...}} placeholders, then POSTs this to Keycloak realm 'spine' as identity provider 'okta'. Client secret never lives in this file — wizard reads from vault using {{CLIENT_SECRET_PATH_IN_VAULT}}.

_comment_placeholders.{{OKTA_DOMAIN}}: Customer's Okta tenant, e.g. 'acme.okta.com' (no scheme, no trailing slash)
_comment_placeholders.{{CLIENT_ID}}: OIDC app Client ID from customer's Okta admin
_comment_placeholders.{{CLIENT_SECRET_PATH_IN_VAULT}}: Vault path, e.g. 'secret/spine/idp/okta/client-secret' — shared/secrets/ resolves at runtime
